title: nie-hlns W4: E2E — two-instance chat + old-client rejection
description:
## What
End-to-end integration test: two separate nie-cli instances connect to a nie-relay over JSON-RPC 2.0, exchange a message, and confirm delivery. Also verify that a client sending the old RelayMessage format gets a -32700 parse error.

## Algorithm
1. Spawn an in-process relay (same pattern as stress test: use relay::ws_handler bound to a TcpListener on a random port)
2. Start two CLI instances with separate data dirs (/tmp/nie-e2e-alice, /tmp/nie-e2e-bob)
3. Alice connects and sends a Broadcast with known payload
4. Bob connects and receives a Deliver notification with that payload
5. Assert: DeliverParams.payload == original bytes; DeliverParams.from == alice's pub_id
6. Old-client rejection test:
   - Open a raw WebSocket connection to the relay
   - After receiving the Challenge notification, send a raw RelayMessage::Authenticate (old format)
   - Expect: receive a JsonRpcResponse with error.code == rpc_errors::PARSE_ERROR or INVALID_REQUEST

## Defensive programming rules
- Use TempDir for data dirs; drop after test to clean up
- Kill relay after test (KillOnDrop or abort handle)
- Do not use fixed ports; use port 0 (OS assigns ephemeral)
- Old-client test: check that the response has 'error.code' as integer, not string

## Agent team: Standard (R + I + T)
- R: Read relay/tests/stress.rs to understand in-process relay spawn pattern; confirm port-0 approach
- I: Implement the E2E test as a new test in relay/tests/e2e_jsonrpc.rs
- T: Review test oracle independence: alice's payload is a known constant, bob's received payload must match that constant exactly; from must be alice's pub_id from identity.pub_id()

## Tests
- two_client_message_delivery: alice sends, bob receives, payload matches
- from_field_is_alice_pub_id: bob's DeliverParams.from == alice.pub_id()
- old_format_client_gets_error: raw old-format Authenticate → receive error JSON with integer code
acceptance_criteria: cargo test --workspace passes; e2e tests pass; old-client rejection test passes; full workspace clippy clean; 'cargo fmt --all' produces no changes
